title: PubLedge Joint Interpretation Agreement (JIA)
description: Frontmatter schema for a PubLedge JIA instrument — a written, jointly-authored interpretation between a regulator and a regulated party that constrains future behavior on identified facts. Binds to Semantic Arts gist via @type and w3id.org IRIs.

@type.description: JSON-LD type. Canonical value for JIAs.

id.description: Permanent PubLedge identifier in the form PL-JIA-NNNN (four-digit sequential).

authority.description: Kebab-case ID of the issuing or co-authoring authority (matches an authority entity).

jurisdiction.description: ISO-style jurisdiction code (e.g. us-ut, us-ca, us-federal).

supersedes.description: ID of a prior PubLedge instrument this one replaces.

statute_anchors.description: URLs pointing to external statute references this JIA interprets. EveryAILaw anchors preferred.

requesting_party.description: Legal name of the party requesting the interpretation.

interpreting_authority.description: Legal name of the authority providing the interpretation.
